topics.topic: Hardening a self-hosted OpenClaw deployment on a VPS without losing useful automations
topics.title: How to Harden OpenClaw on a VPS Without Breaking the Good Parts
topics.summary: A practical guide to securing OpenClaw on a VPS with least-privilege credentials, reduced network exposure, approval boundaries, cron hygiene, and operational visibility.

topics.topic: Practical security patterns for MCP servers used by tool-calling agents
topics.title: Secure MCP Server Design Patterns for Real Tool-Calling Agents
topics.summary: A practical tutorial on designing MCP servers with narrow tools, write approvals, server-side validation, session isolation, prompt-injection defenses, and structured observability.
